title: Rich Flaky Polish Pierogi Dough Dumplings
description: A kid-friendly Polish dish featuring a nutty and flaky dough filled with a sweet and spicy Thai chilli jam, boiled to perfection and keto-friendly.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, melted butter, eggs, and salt, and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of Thai chilli jam in the center of each dough circle.
Top the jam with a tablespoon of shredded cheese and a dollop of sour cream.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-circle shape and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and gently add the dumplings.
Cook the dumplings for 10 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
